segments.text: When two full years had passed, Pharaoh had a dream: He was standing by the Nile,
when out of the river there came up seven cows, sleek and fat, and they grazed among the reeds.
After them, seven other cows, ugly and gaunt, came up out of the Nile and stood beside those on the riverbank.
And the cows that were ugly and gaunt ate up the seven sleek, fat cows. Then Pharaoh woke up.
In the morning his mind was troubled, so he sent for all the magicians and wise men of Egypt.
Pharaoh told them his dreams, but no one could interpret them for him.
Then the chief cupbearer said to Pharaoh,
Today I am reminded of my shortcomings.
segments.speaker: Chief Cupbearer

segments.text: Pharaoh said to Joseph,
I had a dream, and no one can interpret it. But I have heard it said of you that when you hear a dream you can interpret it.
segments.speaker: Pharaoh

segments.text: I cannot do it, but God will give Pharaoh the answer he desires.
segments.speaker: Joseph

segments.text: Then Joseph said to Pharaoh,
The dreams of Pharaoh are one and the same. God has revealed to Pharaoh what he is about to do.
segments.speaker: Joseph

segments.text: So Pharaoh asked them,
Can we find anyone like this man, one in whom is the spirit of God?
segments.speaker: Pharaoh

segments.text: Then Pharaoh said to Joseph,
You shall be in charge of my palace, and all my people are to submit to your orders. Only with respect to the throne will I be greater than you.
segments.speaker: Pharaoh

segments.text: Then Pharaoh said to Joseph,
I am Pharaoh, but without your word no one will lift hand or foot in all Egypt.
segments.speaker: Pharaoh

segments.text: Joseph named his firstborn Manasseh and said,
It is because God has made me forget all my trouble and all my father's household.
segments.speaker: Joseph

segments.text: The second son he named Ephraim and said,
It is because God has made me fruitful in the land of my suffering.
segments.speaker: Joseph

segments.text: Then Pharaoh told all the Egyptians,
Go to Joseph and do what he tells you.
segments.speaker: Pharaoh
